subject: (no subject)
body:
jp.. we have gotten way off track..   I engaged you to design and build my main house..... the guest area was an afterthought,  to be designed AFTER the main house was in drawings. we have spent much useless time..the level changes in the guest area which I have pointed out to your team over six months ago, were  again very innacurate  I have repeatedly said that to design something in an office , and not on the island has been tried and failed many times.. The model of the guest area, was quite disturbing   Seperate from the library which we are copying the inside ,, we are not very far along.PLEase provide me a firm schedule for project design-- I would like this by tomorrow as this is also long overdue.. you got insulted when 8 months ago, I suggested that you and I together hire people with the experience and time to get this done..when will I have a design for the main house, the atelier   please call me today to discuss 340 775 8111


 
____________________________________________________________________________________
